why: Protocol 775 Login clientbound minecraft:login_finished must dispatch id 0x02 to the official ClientboundLoginFinishedPacket body shape generated from client.jar through LoginProtocols.CLIENTBOUND.codec(). The official body is ByteBufCodecs.GAME_PROFILE: UUID, PLAYER_NAME stringUtf8(16), and GAME_PROFILE_PROPERTIES.
what: The exact Rust oracle test for login_finished_clientbound_framed_dispatch panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Login, Direction::Clientbound, packet id 2, official login_finished body bytes) because the current Protocol 775 Login clientbound table has no mapping for packet id 0x02.

body_shape: GameProfile properties count and property entries via ByteBufCodecs.GAME_PROFILE_PROPERTIES
